svg.title: End-to-end knowledge flow for a CA workers' comp deposition
svg.desc: Case sources are ingested and enriched, stored in a Knowledge Hub scoped to a case, then retrieved by an Opus agent that uses derived findings as an index and verifies facts against retained raw sources.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What did the cheap background agents pre-compute, and why are their findings treated as an index rather than as evidence?')
sendPrompt('Walk through how Opus 4.8 decomposes the attorney request into structural and semantic intents and orders the output for settlement pressure.')
g.text: index via findings, verify vs source

svg.text: Amber = derived "cheat sheet" — always verified before use.
Teal = reusable practice-area knowledge (AMA Guides, Skills).
